'''Habba Kee''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]] who raced before [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], and he was considered one of the best in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia">{{CSWECite|II|205|Kee, Habba}}</ref> Kee hit part of [[Obitoki]]'s destroyed pod, wrecking his own racer as well.

==Behind the scenes==
This character only appears in the novelization of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']], and no specific descriptions or references to him are made in the book. He is also seen in the script for the film. He shares a surname with another podracer who took part in the Boonta Eve Classic, [[Neva Kee/Legends|Neva Kee]], indicating a possible relation between the two, although none has been confirmed in canon.
